name: WinterShield Alpha
raw_description: Prototype windshield with laminated glass plies, a transparent conductive mesh close to the interlayer, electrical busbars at the edge, and temperature sensors that only heat the lower de-icing zone near the wiper rest.

name: VisionMount Lite
raw_description: Windshield concept with an internal mounting pad for rain and light sensors, an adhesive fixing layer, rib-based alignment guidance, and a detachable sensor bracket for service replacement.

name: HUDQuiet Glass
raw_description: Acoustic windshield for a head-up display using a wedge-shaped interlayer in the viewing zone together with a heat reflective coating and laminated sound damping layer.
